title: Material Ascension
description: Integrates Create, Basic Weapons, and More Ores More Gems together and adds several legendary weapons to create in the late game
body:
> Made for the **[Cognata](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cognata)** modpack

> Made for **[More Ores More Gems](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-ores-more-gem)** version *1.0.9*

![Material Ascension Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/267b3a17f9722f798d0437ef10c4ce28784aaabd.png)

This mod does a few things:
1. Integrates Create's metalworking mechanics with vanilla and modded progression
2. Brings the vanilla+ weaponry of Basic Weapons to the material variety of More Ores More Gems
3. Adds advanced handles and rods for better toolmaking and use in modpacks
4. Includes several legendary weapons made with create's mechanical crafting
5. Fully supports the Better Combat mod!

### ✅ Required Mods:
- [MORE ORES MORE GEMS](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-ores-more-gem)
- [CREATE](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [BASIC WEAPONS](https://github.com/Khazoda/basic-weapons)

You will have to manually modify recipes if you do not use the above mods!

### 🔳 Optional Mods: (but recommended)
- [BETTER COMBAT](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
- [ENDLESS OF HEART](https://modrinth.com/mod/endless-heart)
- [TWIGS](https://modrinth.com/mod/twigs)



## 🗒️ Content

### ⚔️ New weapons:
> Dagger, Hammer, Club, Spear, Quarterstaff, Glaive 
> 
> All in new materials: 
> 
> Skysteel, Mysticrain Quartz, Aetherium, Shadowsteel, Titanium quartz, Steel, Titanium, Crimsonite, Sliver (not spelled wrong), Shadowite, Sapphire, Topaz, Ruby, Citrine, Jade, and Crystal
### 👑 Legendary weapons and artifacts 
> Some of the legendary weapons (artifacts) require ingredients from other mods. You can usually assume they require the mods listed above as required, but some also require extra mods. 
> - Zebasi Glaive
> - Diamond destroyer
> - Charged Broadsword
> - Copy Sword (inspired by kirby)
> - Fool's Gold Blade (requires [Twigs](https://modrinth.com/mod/twigs))
> - Ruby Katana
> - Shadow Blade (requires [Endless of Heart](https://modrinth.com/mod/endless-heart))
> - Toxic Sword (requires [Endless of Heart](https://modrinth.com/mod/endless-heart))
> - Royal Scythe
> - Charged Scythe (animated)
> - Arcane Dagger 
> - Prismatic Hammer
> - Ancient Spear
>
> Most of these were made for or at the request of friends, and some are redone versions of the weapons from my other mod [Parrot's Plushies](https://modrinth.com/mod/parrots-plushies). Others were just made for fun.
### 🧱 New components and crafting ingredients 
> New Sheets and Plates:
> - Aetherium Sheet
> - Sliver Sheet
> - Titanium Quartz Sheet
> - Steel Sheet
> - Jade Sheet (Verdant Alloy)
> - Skysteel Sheet
> - Shadowsteel Sheet
> - Crimsonite Sheet
> - Shadowite Sheet
> - Nyxium Sheet
> - Topaz Plate
> - Citrine Plate
> - Sapphire Plate
> - Crystal Plate
> - Sunflare Plate
> - Diamond Plate
> - Ruby Plate
> 
> New Tool Handles and Rods:
> - Basic Tool Handle
> - Iron Rod
> - Iron Tool Handle
> - Steel Rod
> - Steel Tool Handle
> - Nyxium Rod
> - Nyxium Tool Handle
> 
> There's also an Ussingite Dust
### 🛠️ New Alloying Recipes
> The mod updates both Create's brass alloying recipes and More Ores More Gem's steel, skysteel, titanium quartz, jade, and shadowsteel alloying recipes. 
>  
> The mod also adds a new alloy, nyxium, used solely to craft the very endgame weapons and tools, Artifacts.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack! All dependencies of this mod are only required because of recipe compatibilities so it is fully possible to use this mod on its own if you change the recipes.
